'''fashaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kynology|kynology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kynology|kynology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fashaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæshæyæth|fæshæyæth]] || [[word:fæshæyæj|fæshæyæj]] || [[word:fæshæyæsh|fæshæyæsh]] || [[word:fæshæyæ|fæshæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fashashayath|fashashayath]] || [[word:fashashayaj|fashashayaj]] || [[word:fashashayash|fashashayash]] || [[word:fashashaya|fashashaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fashayath|fashayath]] || [[word:fashayaj|fashayaj]] || [[word:fashayash|fashayash]] || [[word:fashaya|fashaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fashafyath|fashafyath]] || [[word:fashafyaj|fashafyaj]] || [[word:fashafyash|fashafyash]] || [[word:fashafyaf|fashafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fashayatha|fashayatha]] || [[word:fashayaja|fashayaja]] || [[word:fashayasha|fashayasha]] || [[word:fashayaka|fashayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fashayath|fashayath]] || [[word:fashayaj|fashayaj]] || [[word:fashayash|fashayash]] || [[word:fashaya|fashaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fashayathal|fashayathal]] || [[word:fashayajal|fashayajal]] || [[word:fashayashal|fashayashal]] || [[word:fashayakal|fashayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fashayathatha|fashayathatha]] || [[word:fashayajaja|fashayajaja]] || [[word:fashayashasha|fashayashasha]] || [[word:fashayaka|fashayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fashayathan|fashayathan]] || [[word:fashayajan|fashayajan]] || [[word:fashayashan|fashayashan]] || [[word:fashayakan|fashayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fashayathaoro|fashayathaoro]] || [[word:fashayajaoro|fashayajaoro]] || [[word:fashayashaoro|fashayashaoro]] || [[word:fashayakaoro|fashayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
